name: Oakridge International Limited
summary: Oakridge International Limited develops Internet of Things technology solutions for consumer, commercial, industrial, and healthcare markets. It operates through Healthcare Technology, Technology Development, and Geothermal Projects segments. The company offers DiscoverBus wireless sensor network designed to create secure indoor wireless networks for smart office, smart building, industrial, and commercial applications; and DiscoverBus wired hub and node network primarily designed for wired networks for smart office, smart building, industrial, and commercial applications. It also provides Smart Home Gateway to automate, monitor, and control home; communication technology solutions, including the development and distribution of range of nurse call hardware and software solutions for use in hospitals, aged care, disability care, and supported independent living; and operates various geothermal projects. The company was formerly known as Xped Limited and changed its name to Oakridge International Limited in April 2021. Oakridge International Limited is based in Payneham, Australia.
